answer:
<think> Ritchie Valens' most notably covered song is "La Bamba". He recorded it for Del-Fi Records in 1958. To find out who owned Del-Fi Records during that time, I need to look up the history of the record label. </think>

<answer> \boxed{Nick and Deltec Records (Nicholas and Deltec Delgado)}

Del-Fi Records was originally founded by Marshall Lieb and Edna Lieb in 1952. However, in 1958, they sold the label to Nick and Deltec Records (Nicholas and Deltec Delgado). This is when Ritchie Valens recorded "La Bamba" for the label.
